title: OntologyImpactReport
description: A version-bound impact preview for a governed ontology operation.

operation.description: Governed operation evaluated by this report.

impactToken.description: Short-lived signed token bound to the principal and exact impact snapshot.

children.description: Immediate child concepts that must be reassigned or explicitly cascaded.

relationships.description: Typed semantic relationships removed with the resource.

boundAssets.description: Bound assets included in the preview, capped by the service preview limit.

boundAssetCount.description: Total number of assets bound to the concept.

boundAssetsTruncated.description: Whether the bound-assets sample omits additional assets.

conceptMappings.description: External crosswalks removed with the concept.

shaclRecheckRequired.description: Whether the resulting ontology projection must be revalidated after application.
